sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed after UP did
before = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation
after = last_transition.after_frame.segmentation
before_nodes = {n['id']: n for n in before['nodes']}
after_nodes = {n['id']: n for n in after['nodes']}
changed = []
for nid, n in after_nodes.items():
    if nid in before_nodes:
        bn = before_nodes[nid]
        if bn['boundary'] != n['boundary']:
            changed.append((nid, n['color'], bn['boundary'], n['boundary']))
print("Changed nodes:")
for c in changed:
    print(c)
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
